name: Sarah
prompt: 128 BPM energetic electronic dance-pop, festive birthday celebration atmosphere, heavy four-on-the-floor kick drum, bright synthesizers, crowd claps. Solo Indian female vocalist with crisp English pronunciation. The main song and vocals must start immediately at 0:02 after a short 3-2-1 countdown. High-energy electronic dance music throughout the entire track
lyrics:
[Intro]
3! 2! 1! Go!

[Verse 1]
Happy birthday to you
Happy birthday to you
Happy birthday dear Sarah
Happy birthday to you

[Verse 2]
May your dreams all come true
May your days be bright and new
May laughter fill your heart today
And happiness stay with you

[Chorus]
Celebrate and sing along
This is your special day
Friends and family gathered here
To cheer and celebrate

[Verse 3]
Wishing joy and wishing love
Wishing smiles the whole year through
May good fortune walk beside you
And every wish come through

[Chorus]
Celebrate and sing along
This is your special day
Friends and family gathered here
To cheer and celebrate

[Verse 4]
Let the music lift you high
See the sparks fly to the sky
Make a wish and blow them out
Hear the whole crowd cheer and shout

[Chorus]
Celebrate and sing along
This is your special day
Friends and family gathered here
To cheer and celebrate

[Outro]
Happy birthday dear Sarah
We celebrate with you
Happy birthday dear Sarah
May all your dreams come true

[End]

export.note: MP3 is metadata-stripped upload copy. Keep JSON local only.
